scripts.clean: npm run clean:admin && npm run clean:allauth && npm run clean:app
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:allauth && npm run build:app
scripts.lint: npm run lint:admin && npm run lint:allauth && npm run lint:app
scripts.watch: conc -n admin,allauth,app -c auto "npm run watch:admin" "npm run watch:allauth" "npm run watch:app"
